description: Style Note Add a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product Details Golden coloured earringFlower shaped base with white beaded detail surrounding a maroon coloured stone in the centreWhite pearl like beads clustered at the intersection of base and dangler Rounded conical shaped dangler with pearl like beads, red inlays and a maroon tear drop shaped stone hanging from the bottom   Material and Care Metal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 92 mm
